benchmark: WearEdge oil-leak strict LMM image benchmark

lmm_parsed.operator_observation: Oil leakage, gearbox 82C, bearing 69C, vibration 7.8 mm/s trend rising, warning light on, drive station running.

request.operator_observation: Oil leakage, gearbox 82C, bearing 69C, vibration 7.8 mm/s trend rising, warning light on, drive station running.

agent.name: lao-shi-fu predictive maintenance
agent.business_value: Reduce downtime by converting M400 evidence into CMMS-ready maintenance work-order drafts.

opea_pipeline_result.architecture: OPEA-style Gateway -> Manufacturing Megaservice -> Dataprep -> RAG -> LLM -> Evaluator -> Guardrails

payload.title: Operator sensory observation
payload.content: High-pitched noise, burnt-oil smell, abnormal heat, visible shaking, or fresh oil leakage are valid operator sensory evidence. They should escalate the action card only when paired with accepted machine identity and condition evidence.

payload.title: Gearbox vibration escalation
payload.content: For PKG-L3-GBX-03, vibration RMS above 7.0 mm/s with a yellow PLC alarm should be treated as a maintenance risk. Capture the condition screen, reduce load if required by plant procedure, and create a maintenance work-order draft for technician confirmation.

payload.title: Lubrication record cross-check
payload.content: If lubrication interval exceeds 14 days or oil leakage is visible, request lubrication record evidence and recent work-order history before recommending restart or maintenance release.

opea_pipeline_result.llm_explanation: lao-shi-fu predictive maintenance for PKG-L3-GBX-03 has 4 accepted evidence flags. The strongest retrieved maintenance sources are GBX-HUMAN-01, GBX-VIB-01, GBX-LUBE-01. Operator observation: Oil leakage, gearbox 82C, bearing 69C, vibration 7.8 mm/s trend rising, warning light on, drive station running.. The system should create a bounded action card, preserve source IDs, and keep restricted decisions human-confirmed.
